title: Race Selection Strategy
content: Race choice determines province strengths, weaknesses, military options, and preferred battlefield role.

title: Personality Selection Strategy
content: Personality choice enhances a province role and should match the player's intended strategy.

title: Attacker Build Strategy
content: Attacker provinces focus on offense, military strength, land gains, and coordinated kingdom attacks.

title: Defender Build Strategy
content: Defender provinces focus on survival, defense, and reducing enemy attack success.

title: Mage Build Strategy
content: Mage provinces focus on wizards, rune production, spell casting, and magical support.

title: Thief Build Strategy
content: Thief provinces focus on thieves, intelligence gathering, and sabotage operations.

title: Hybrid Build Strategy
content: Hybrid provinces combine multiple roles and require balancing military, magic, and thievery.

title: Province Optimization
content: Province optimization balances buildings, military, population, science, and role requirements.

title: Race Strengths
content: Each race has unique advantages that influence battlefield performance and preferred strategies.

title: Race Weaknesses
content: Understanding race weaknesses helps identify enemy vulnerabilities and counter strategies.

title: Personality Strengths
content: Personalities provide bonuses that shape province development and war performance.

title: Personality Counters
content: Enemy personalities can be analyzed to identify weaknesses and opportunities.

title: Province Identity
content: A province identity defines its role, responsibilities, and contribution to kingdom success.

title: Kingdom Composition
content: A balanced kingdom combines different province roles to cover offense, defense, magic, and thievery needs.

title: Meta Strategy
content: Strategy changes with age balance, race changes, kingdom goals, and opponent composition.
